shared_properties: Canvas target is 1280x720 px at 60 fps.
Core palette copy is embedded in this file with primary #3D2B1F, background #E8D5C4, accent #D4A843.
Outline stroke uses 2 px dark brown edge color #3D2B1F.
differences: This layer carries only distant architecture and no interactive collider shape.

context.usage: Used in every stage as the far palace silhouette behind puzzle play.

notes: Eight arched window bays span the width at 140 px bay width with 20 px mullions.
Moonlight glow uses #F5F0E8 at 24% opacity inside each arch.

shape.silhouette: wide palace wall band with eight arch window cutouts and a continuous sill line

deliverables: Single layered background sheet 1280x360 px with transparent cutouts for eight arches.
Optional light mask sheet for arch glow using #F5F0E8.
acceptance_criteria: Canvas size is exactly 1280x360 px with transparent outer margin.
Eight arch bays are visible and evenly spaced across 1280 px width.
No foreground prop or character silhouette crosses the lower 140 px of this layer.
